scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @earendil-works/pi-tui && tsgo -p pi/packages/ai/tsconfig.build.json && npm run build --workspace @earendil-works/pi-agent-core && npm run build --workspace @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent && npm run build --workspace @beemax/automation && npm run build --workspace @beemax/core && npm run build --workspace @beemax/memory && npm run build --workspace @beemax/feishu-capability && npm run build --workspace @beemax/mcp-capability && npm run build --workspace @beemax/gateway && npm run build --workspace @beemax/cli
scripts.models:update: npm run generate-models --workspace @earendil-works/pi-ai && npm run generate-image-models --workspace @earendil-works/pi-ai
scripts.test: node --test apps/cli/test/*.test.mjs packages/automation/test/*.test.mjs packages/core/test/*.test.mjs packages/memory/test/*.test.mjs packages/gateway/test/*.test.mjs
